project.label: Long tasks over 50ms
project.note: Release proxy for main-thread blocking. The spec target is <8ms; the Long Tasks API only surfaces tasks over 50ms.

verified.name: Google Core Web Vitals

targets.label: Largest Contentful Paint
targets.note: web.dev defines good LCP as 2.5s or less at the 75th percentile.

targets.label: Cumulative Layout Shift
targets.note: web.dev defines good CLS as 0.1 or less at the 75th percentile.

notes: web.dev defines good INP as 200ms or less at the 75th percentile.
This release report is lab-based; INP needs RUM. TBT is reported as the lab proxy per web.dev guidance.

results.label: Largest Contentful Paint
results.note: web.dev defines good LCP as 2.5s or less at the 75th percentile.

results.label: Cumulative Layout Shift
results.note: web.dev defines good CLS as 0.1 or less at the 75th percentile.

verified.name: Chrome Lighthouse Performance Score
notes: Lighthouse 10 weights: FCP 10%, Speed Index 10%, LCP 25%, TBT 30%, CLS 25%.
Scores fluctuate with device conditions and test variability; use repeated runs for trend analysis.
